emails.subject: Re: Phone numbers
emails.body: Two costs will be re-signing the pipeline call-in numbers on sing throught the whole pipelinenetwork and all stationary/business cards for the estate. I would think Netco would want a clean break and we could share 853 until a new extension can be secured. Jeff Donahue Managing Director Corporate Development Sent: Thu Jan 10 15:43:11 2002

emails.subject: Re: Phone numbers
emails.body: Re: Phone numbers Can we have them until we move? That would probably be the easiest time to give them up. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: Re: Phone numbers
emails.body: I think that would be fine if it works for Netco. Jeff Donahue Managing Director Corporate Development Sent: Thu Jan 10 16:09:58 2002
